item.dc:creator: Fawin

item.title: Cibi and Haka. Two cultures meeting
item.description: The Cibi and Haka are both war dances. The Cibi originated from Fiji and can be performed before or after war. It is also called Teivovo or "war fence" hence the linear formation. The haka is performed before war as a way to instill fear into the other side. It is also used for moral support to soldiers, show strength/unity/pride, and welcome/challenge visiting tribes. The haka is based from New Zealand.
item.dc:creator: Zergcollective

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1076 (chicken of executive function)
item.description:
It's morning. Bread and coffee time.
Don't touch the Cactus.
.... shit
Dimetrodon by Natalia Jagielska
Poor Dunkolesteus. What a loss.
Spooky.
The White Bellbird is the Loudest bird in the world; one type of call peaks at 125 decibels: about the same as a pneumatic drill. Check one out here, it's wild--barely sounds like a living creature. https://youtu.be/nREYBx4eZf8?si=N9pGTYUX09Sr1E2e
Gonna call @sisipherr out on this one.
For once, doesn't apply to me.
I'm out of PTO thanks to the whole medical debacle earlier this year at work, but sometimes you need to take a vacation anyway, and because this time of year is so slow, I'm really only missing one day of work for my upcoming adventure.
Yo, @SecretHarpy let's suffer together
Oops.
All of you, I'm glad you're here, and I truly mean that. Even the trolls.
"Also, he's being carried on a litter by wasps for some reason"
I may not make the best money, but the Sedona outdoors is one of the best offices I've ever worked at, and as an autistic person, I'm effectively being paid to infodump about many of special interests: birds, botany, and bgeology.
Hopefully, this card helps someone today.
I have, after some exploration and examination through the last few years, concluded I am indeed male, though there are some days when my brain is over-stressed, where I definitely lean towards wishing I was a non-corporeal energy entity, which I guess might be considered non-binary by some folk. That being said, would totally wear a skirt; skirts and kilts are especially comfortable in summer, and hide extra knives. The Scots were right all along. Or just long tunics. However, can't get away with a kilt at work; we have to sort of dress like cowboys. Which, honestly, ain't bad.
Pippin tax! Pippin's message of the day: "Glory Pippin. Okay."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i still want one
looks edible at least
that's Peter Griffin
that has to be intentional
arrest her
makes more sense than the correct spelling. damn french
i have no words
egg
oversharing, man
don't we all
mmm hmm
i recently had a dream where i thought i was about to squeeze out a blackhead on my leg but it was a small centipede. sorry for sharing this
obviously
that ain't right
unhinged
this is where i post from
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Bath Bomb Girl
item.description: 10-year-old Hannah Grace may be young but she knows how to cash in on a trend. By selling homemade bath bombs through her own website, BeYOUtiful, and even giving back 20% to a cause that’s close to her heart -- juvenile diabetes -- she’s quickly becoming an entrepreneur in her own right.
item.dc:creator: 60SecondDocs
